subject: Context: Series B $22M
body:
Marcus,

NovaSpark's open roles have increased 60% in the last 60 days.

Companies at this stage often need to accelerate their ML platform to keep pace.

Tenacious can augment your ML platform engineering to accelerate cost analytics capabilities.

What's your biggest bottleneck to scaling the platform right now?

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
